productDisplayName: ADIDAS Brown Agora Lea Casual Shoe
description: Take training to the next level in these Agora Lea shoes from adidas. Constructed for better comfort and cushioning, these shoes help you train longer and better. Team these with jeans and tees for great urban style.UpperSuede uppers with mesh inlays for better structure and comfortadidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performanceMesh tongue provides better breathabilityPadded collar offers better comfortLace-up system for a snug, customized FitBrand name embroidered on the tongue and below the collarHaul loop on the collar for easy removal of the shoeMidsoleSturdy footbed provides all day comfort and supportEVA midsole provides better shock absorption and cushioningOutsoleAggressive TPR oursole comprised of multi-directional lugs on the forefoot, heel and periphery of the foot for better gripOutsole extends and builds up to the sides, heel and forefoot to give better grip and protection on all sidesReinforced midfoot arch for better arch supportShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
